text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Finally, the time has come for me to show
everyone.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Got that? I'm winning today for sure! I've got just the magic to do it!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Here I go! Krims, crimson, gloriosa! ☆ Crimson
swell, bring me victory!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. This spell will bring me good luck. I feel
like I'm getting stronger already!
choice_data_list: Go show everyone how strong your magic is!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Obviously! Don't take your eyes off me, Familiar!
